notes_for_human_reviewer: Floor submission. Endorses the 12-week green run as 'reassuring'. Explicitly advises AGAINST going amber on workstream 2 ('would invite questions we don't need to answer'). Defends 'resource availability' as covering most things. Accepts Friday afternoon as fine timing. Endorses the closing note. LinkedIn-speak ('leverage clear executive communication'). Every dim floors at 1 — the submission actively defends every named anti-pattern and explicitly recommends color washing as a sponsor-management strategy. This is the coordinator who has internalised that bad news invites attention and decides attention is the problem to be managed.
